ORDER ON MOTION FOR CLAIM OF SURPLUS PROCEEDS OF TRUSTEE'S SALE

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, CLAIMANT STANLEY LEE, KITTY LEE MOTION / NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR CLAIM OF SURPLUS PROCEEDS OF TRUSTEES SALE IS DENIED. PURSUANT TO CCP 2924K, CLAIM FILED ON MAY 14, 2014 AND OPPOSITION FILED ON SEPTEMBER 1, 2016, FTB HAS A SUPERIOR CLAIM TO THE FUNDS ON DEPOSIT WITH THE COURT. FUNDS ON DEPOSIT WITH THE COURT IN THE AMOUNT OF $40,941, PLUS INTEREST, IF ANY, ACCRUED THEREON, SHALL BE DISTRIBUTED TO FTB UP TO THE AMOUNT OF $59,664.11. ORDER IS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.(SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: SUZANNE R. BOLANOS, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (D501)

calendar.matters:
MOTION / Notice Of Motion And Motion For Claim Of Surplus Proceeds Of Trustees Sale
Off Calendar Sep-29-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Heather Brae Hoesterey, Deputy Attorney General (415-703-5506) Claimant/Opposing party Franchise Tax Board.
No other Appearance.

No Argument. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

CLAIMANT STANLEY LEE, KITTY LEE MOTION / Notice Of Motion And Motion For Claim Of Surplus Proceeds Of Trustees Sale is DENIED. Pursuant to CCP 2924k, claim filed on May 14, 2014 and opposition filed on September 1, 2016, FTB has a superior claim to the funds on deposit with the Court. Funds on deposit with the Court in the amount of $40,941, plus interest, if any, accrued thereon, shall be distributed to FTB up to the amount of $59,664.11. Order is signed in open court.(see scanned order for details) Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

MOTION / Notice Of Motion And Motion For Claim Of Surplus Proceeds Of Trustees Sale
Off Calendar Sep-19-2016 Continued To Sep-29-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

CLAIMANTS STANLEY LEE, KITTY LEE'S MOTION For Claim Of Surplus Proceeds Of Trustees Sale is Continued to September 29, 2016 on Court's own motion. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion On [Proposed] Order To Deposit Surplus Funds
Off Calendar Dec-03-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No Appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER RECONTRUST COMPANY's Motion On Order To Deposit Surplus Funds is GRANTED. Surplus funds shall be deposited with the Court forthwith. Petitioner shall be discharged. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)
